completed_tasks.name: Quick task: dark theme fix + discovery hint i18n

decisions.decision: Dark theme: rgba(128,128,128,0.1) backgrounds + opacity:0.6 for text
decisions.rationale: LMS has no CSS custom properties; rgba/opacity works on both light and dark skins

decisions.decision: Discovery restart hint added to setup guide
decisions.rationale: Beta tester sezercoban reported discovery not detecting account after plugin enable without restart

decisions.decision: v1.5.0 release with partial podcast milestone (browse+search, not follow/unfollow)
decisions.rationale: Core podcast experience is complete; library actions and i18n polish come in v1.5.1+

context_notes: v1.5.0 shipped. Phase 20 is small — 2 requirements (POD-04, POD-05), reuses existing PUT/DELETE /me/library endpoint from Like button (Phase 15). Beta tester sezercoban confirmed core features work on Docker LMS v1.9.2.
